title: C_HW7 (hamming)
author: Ken Youens-Clark

steps_raw.instruction: Checkout or update (git pull) https://github.com/kyclark/metagenomics-book $ ssh hpc $ (cd metagenomics-book && git pull) $ cp -r metagenomics-book/problems/hamming ~/abe487/problems $ cd !$ $ git add hamming $ git commit -m 'adding hamming' hamming $ git push
Solve, then "git commit" your work and "git push" to Github.
